name: South Texas Lending
description_short: San Antonio-based mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, debt consolidation, and FHA/VA loans with 24/7 support and a stated lowest-rate guarantee.
description_long:
South Texas Lending is a San Antonio-based mortgage lender founded by CEO Ben Gheliuc, positioning itself as a simplified alternative to traditional lenders. The company operates a small team including a branch manager, loan coordinator, loan officer, and processor, and reports closing 713 mortgage loans in 2022 with 56 veteran homes completed. They emphasize streamlined processes and personal service as their core differentiators in a competitive market.

The company offers a range of mortgage products including conventional loans, FHA loans, VA loans, home purchase financing with underwritten pre-approvals, refinancing options (including debt consolidation via cash-out refi and HELOC), 203k rehabilitation loans, and debt consolidation services. They advertise a 15-business-day refinance closing timeline, minimal closing costs, and claim to serve borrowers with limited or no credit history. Their website includes a payment calculator and emphasizes 24/7 availability via phone (210-750-6164 and 210-750-6461—note the discrepancy in listed numbers).

Distinguishing factors include their "lowest rate guaranteed or we pay you" claim, stated donation of 10% of proceeds to unspecified causes, and focus on serving veterans and self-employed borrowers with bank statement options. Their website includes educational content comparing conventional vs. FHA loans and explaining compensating factors for credit-challenged borrowers. They promote being "voted Best San Antonio Mortgage Lender," though no third-party verification source is cited.

Limitations are evident: the website contains multiple typos and grammatical errors ("Gauranteed," "Secondar Markets," incomplete sentences), creates confusion with two different phone numbers, and provides no information about licensing, rates, fees, or regulatory compliance. The "lowest rate guaranteed" claim lacks specifics on comparison methodology. Limited team size and local San Antonio focus may restrict scalability and service reach. Educational content, while helpful, is incomplete on key topics.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers pre-approval with underwritten status to compete with cash buyers
Serves borrowers with no credit history using compensating factors (rental history per June 2022 Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac guidelines)
Fast refinance closing timeline of 15 business days with minimal closing costs
Specialized VA loan programs with no down payment and no PMI
Bank statement loan options designed for self-employed borrowers with significant write-offs
Educational content explaining loan type selection (conventional vs. FHA vs. VA) based on credit score and financial situation
cons: Website contains multiple spelling and grammar errors suggesting lack of professional polish ("Gauranteed," "Secondar Markets")
Two different phone numbers listed (210-750-6164 and 210-750-6461) creating confusion about correct contact information
No transparent fee structure, rate sheets, or regulatory licensing information provided on website
Unsubstantiated claims such as "lowest rate guaranteed or we pay you" with no methodology explained
Small team size (4 listed staff members) may limit capacity and responsiveness for larger loan volume
best_for: San Antonio-area homebuyers seeking fast pre-approval with competitive offers in cash-heavy markets
Military veterans interested in VA loans with no down payment and PMI elimination
Self-employed borrowers with irregular income who qualify for bank statement loan programs
Homeowners seeking refinance or debt consolidation through cash-out options with accelerated timelines
diagnosis: South Texas Lending is best suited for San Antonio-area borrowers, particularly veterans and self-employed individuals, seeking faster refinance and pre-approval processes with personalized service. The main caveats are the lack of transparent pricing/licensing information online, potential communication confusion due to multiple listed phone numbers, and an unverified lowest-rate guarantee that requires phone contact to substantiate.
services: Home purchase financing with underwritten pre-approval
Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) for debt payoff
FHA loan origination for borrowers with credit scores 660 and below
VA loan programs with 100% financing and no down payment
Bank statement loan programs for self-employed borrowers
Debt consolidation enabling card payoff at closing
Loan qualification counseling and education via phone hotline
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1846 N Loop 1604 W Ste 205, San Antonio, TX 78248
